barRaise.topFinding: The verdict holds at needs-attention but the reason rotated: the commit-per-patch hard rule reopened. v0.98.10 is fully authored (GDD pill v0.98.10 at line 1380, a complete changelog entry, and the footprint-rebalance code applied to source/world3d/building_catalog_3d.gd) yet sits uncommitted two days on, with HEAD and project.godot config/version both still v0.98.9, so the dirty GDD.html + project.godot (the FUSE-truncation-unacceptable files) stand exposed. Run release.ps1 to land v0.98.10, then the 2D sweep and the profiler baseline.
